# The Safer Sounds Club

A resource for people with misophonia, created by Megan Carlson — licensed therapist, EMDR practitioner, and Sensorimotor Psychotherapy specialist based in Colorado. The Safer Sounds Club offers education, a guided somatic workshop, and a free quiz to help people understand what's underneath their misophonia reaction.

## Pages

- [Home](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/index.html): Introduction to The Safer Sounds Club and Megan's approach to misophonia.
- [About](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/about.html): Megan Carlson's background, training, and personal experience with misophonia.
- [Workshop](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/products.html): The Safer Sounds Workshop — a 60-minute guided somatic experience for misophonia.
- [Free Quiz](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/quiz.html): A 2-minute quiz to identify your misophonia pattern and nervous system response type.
- [FAQ](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/faq.html): Frequently asked questions about misophonia, the workshop, and Megan's approach.
- [Blog](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/blog.html): Articles on misophonia — why it happens, how it affects relationships, and what can help.
- [Contact](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/contact.html): Get in touch with Megan directly.

## Blog Posts

- [Do I Overreact to Chewing?](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/blog/do-i-overreact-to-chewing.html)
- [Misophonia and Relationships](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/blog/misophonia-and-relationships.html)
- [Why Is Misophonia Worse When Stressed?](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/blog/misophonia-worse-when-stressed.html)
- [Why Can't I Ignore Chewing Sounds?](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/blog/why-cant-i-ignore-chewing-sounds.html)
- [Why Coping Strategies Don't Change Misophonia](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/blog/why-coping-strategies-dont-change-misophonia.html)
- [Why Does Misophonia Feel So Out of Control?](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/blog/why-does-misophonia-feel-so-out-of-control.html)
- [Why Does the Sound of Breathing Bother Me?](https://safersoundsclub.pages.dev/blog/why-does-the-sound-of-breathing-bother-me.html)
